data.name: Sex Prison VR
data.detailed_description:
Visit an exceptional prison where sexy naked girls are the prisoners.

There are two types of prison cells to choose from:

- Large prison cell:

There are several cells in this building, some are empty but some of them contain naked girls.

- Small prison cell:

Very small prison cell full of naked hot girls in it, it is very tight.

You will spend nice moments with the girls, each of them you can change your sexual position.
You control her sexual positions..

You can set the girl your favorite sexual position and admire her charms.

Features:

- Naked Girls
- Change Sexual positoin
- Being with hot naked girls in a tight cell
- CUMSHOTS!!!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 3000 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
